changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE user_group ADD CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_user_profile FOREIGN KEY (user_profile_id) REFERENCES user_profile (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, ADD CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_group FOREIGN KEY (group_id) REFERENCES "group" (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, ADD CONSTRAINT uq_user_group_membership UNIQUE (user_profile_id, group_id);
